overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunlit medieval Mediterranean-style village. The character navigates cobblestone streets, ascends stone staircases, passes villagers and animals, and reaches a scenic terrace overlook with panoramic views of a lake and distant mountains.

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a long stone staircase flanked by walls, transitioning from the enclosed street to an elevated path. A distinctive blue tower comes into view on the left as the landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunny village square dominated by a large shade tree. Geralt walks past a woman in a green dress and chickens pecking at the ground. The area features a yellow half-timbered building and stone stairs on the left.

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a scenic terrace overlook with wooden railings adorned with purple flower planters. The character stops to take in the breathtaking panoramic view of a blue lake, distant mountains, and the terracotta rooftops of the village below. A woman in a red dress stands at the railing to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval village that transitions from narrow cobblestone streets to an expansive scenic overlook. It begins by following Geralt past stone buildings and a red plaster house before ascending a long stone staircase that opens the landscape to reveal a distant mountain range and a distinctive blue tower. As the camera moves along a winding dirt path past the tower, the scene expands into a sunny village square filled with chickens and a large shade tree. The path then narrows, leading past a tethered white horse and through a stone archway as the environment becomes increasingly adorned with flowers. Finally, the movement culminates on a wooden terrace where the view opens into a breathtaking panorama of a blue lake, terracotta rooftops, and far-off peaks.
